name: qpdf-pdf-ops
description: qpdf-powered PDF page-level operations for Claude Code — lossless replace / delete / extract / merge / split / rotate / reorder / encrypt / decrypt.

plugins.name: qpdf-pdf-ops
plugins.description: Manipulate PDF files with the qpdf CLI — replace, delete, extract, merge, split, rotate, reorder pages, and handle encrypted/password-protected PDFs. Lossless page-level structural edits; original content streams are preserved. Ships 7 ready-to-use shell scripts. Supports Chinese filenames. 无损 PDF 页面操作。
